title: Application form / Antragsformular
rule_summary: Munich LBK guidance lists the application form as part of the building application documents.

title: Official site plan / Amtlicher Lageplan
rule_summary: The site plan or cadastral extract must identify the building plot and relevant surrounding context.

title: Building drawings / Bauzeichnungen
reference: Munich digital building application guidance; BauVorlV §8
rule_summary: Building drawings normally include the necessary graphical plans for the proposed construction.

title: Floor plans / Grundrisse
rule_summary: Building drawings include floor plans of the floors with room use and required dimensions.

title: Sections and elevations / Schnitte und Ansichten
reference: Munich digital building application guidance; BauVorlV §8
rule_summary: Munich guidance describes building drawings as including floor plans, elevations, and sections.

title: Building description / Baubeschreibung
rule_summary: The building description explains the project and supports assessment of the application.

title: Tree stock declaration / Baumbestandserklärung
rule_summary: Munich LBK guidance lists a tree stock declaration among application-related documents; project-specific relevance should be checked.

title: Construction statistics form / Statistischer Erhebungsbogen
rule_summary: Munich LBK guidance lists the statistical survey form among building application documents.

title: Structural stability proof / Standsicherheitsnachweis
rule_summary: Structural stability proof or related declarations may be required depending on building type and review procedure.

title: Fire safety proof / Brandschutznachweis
rule_summary: For fire-safety proof, required fire-safety information may need to be shown in the site plan, building drawings, and building description where relevant.

title: Energy / GEG documentation
rule_summary: Energy documentation should be checked for the specific project type and applicable energy-law requirements.

title: Drainage plan / Entwässerungsplan
rule_summary: Drainage and wastewater/rainwater information should be checked where the project affects site drainage or connections.

title: Parking proof / Stellplatznachweis
rule_summary: Parking proof may be required depending on the project, use, and local requirements.

title: Signatures / Unterschriften
rule_summary: Application documents generally need the required signatures from the applicant/client and relevant planning author.
